title: MapConfig
description: Configuration for the points-map marimo notebook

csv.description: Path to the CSV file (relative to this config file)

bbox.description: Path to a GeoJSON file defining the map bounding box. Defaults to bbox.json next to the CSV. If absent the data extent is used.

lat_col.description: Name of the latitude column in the CSV

lon_col.description: Name of the longitude column in the CSV

label_col.description: Column whose values are used as point labels. Omit to use sequential numeric indices (1, 2, 3 …).

color_col.description: Column whose values drive point colour. Requires color_map.

color_map.description: Maps color_col values to hex colours. Use '__default__' as a fallback for unmatched values.

title.description: Map title shown above the figure

mapbox_style.description: Mapbox style ID, e.g. outdoors-v12, streets-v12, satellite-streets-v12

output.description: Output PNG filename (relative to this config file). Omit to skip saving.
